items.hook: Napoleonic Wars: Napoleon Bonaparte surrenders aboard HMS Bellerophon.
items.body: The Napoleonic Wars (1803–15) were a global series of conflicts fought by a fluctuating array of European coalitions against the French First Republic (1803–04) under the First Consul followed by the First French Empire (1804–15) under the Emperor of the French, Napoleon. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: Swedish–Novgorodian Wars: A Novgorodian army led by Alexander Nevsky defeats the Swedes in the Battle of the Neva.
items.body: The Swedish–Novgorodian Wars were a series of armed conflicts in the 12th and 13th centuries between the Novgorod Republic and medieval Sweden over control of the Gulf of Finland. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: ‘So healing’: can singing Miley Cyrus with strangers cure our spiritual malaise?
items.body:
As people yearn for connection, one-day choirs are popping up around the world - and spreading ‘collective effervescence’

We met in a former synagogue, a vast room with hardwood floors where the sound could echo freely. All were st

items.hook: Pike Expedition: United States Army Lieutenant Zebulon Pike begins an expedition from Fort Bellefontaine near St. Louis, Missouri, to explore the west.
items.body: The Pike Expedition was a military party sent out by President Thomas Jefferson and authorized by the United States government to explore the south and west of the recent Louisiana Purchase. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: Znamenny Chant is a singing tradition used by some in the Russian Eastern Orthodox Church.
items.body: Znamenny Chant is a unison, melismatic liturgical singing that has its own specific notation, called the stolp notation. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: The Day She Returns review – another round of slow, reflective boozing really hits the spot
items.body:
No film-maker shows more day-drinking than Hong Sang-soo, and this study of an actor returning from a career break is the same again – as mysteriously addictive as ever

It will not surprise fans of the prolific lo-fi Korean master

items.hook: The Boeing 367-80, the prototype for both the Boeing 707 and C-135 series, takes its first flight.
items.body: The Boeing 367-80, also known as the Dash 80, is a retired American four-engined prototype jet aircraft by Boeing to demonstrate the advantages of jet propulsion for commercial aviation. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: The First House by Avni Doshi review – an intense portrait of marriage and freedom
items.body:
In the follow-up to the Booker-shortlisted Burnt Sugar, a woman seeks liberation from her controlling relationships

Avni Doshi’s second novel is narrated by an unnamed woman in the suburban US who is shocked to hear her husband ann

items.hook: Çərəkən is a village in Horovlu administrative-territorial unit of Jabrayil district, Azerbaijan, located on a plain, 3 km northeast of the city of Jabrayil.
items.body: The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: SS Polarlys was a Hurtigruten coastal passenger/cargo steamer built in 1912.
items.body: It was seized by the Germans during the Second World War, and served several stints in the Kriegsmarine. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: Gillian Armstrong remembers Sam Neill: ‘I can’t believe that the very next day he was gone’
items.body: The Australian director who gave the actor his big break in My Brilliant Career remembers ‘a smart, gentle, decent, passionate, loyal, surprisingly funny man’

items.hook: Space Shuttle program: Endeavour is launched on STS-127 to complete assembly of the International Space Station's Kibō module.
items.body: The Space Shuttle program was the fourth human spaceflight program carried out by the U.S. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.opener: Here's one for the group chat —
items.hook: The Chungam Faction is a South Korean political faction that refers to Chungam High School alumni who held key positions within the military and government during President Yoon Suk Yeol's administration.
items.body: The faction was formed in 2022, by President Yoon and Presidential Security Service Director Kim Yong-hyun, both fellow graduates of Chungam High School, after Yoon was elected as president. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: Can you spot the poacher’s handprint? Earth Photo award winners – in pictures
items.body: From scientific tricks to stop turtle traffickers to stranded seals and displaced workers, these images all scooped prizes at this year’s Earth Photo awards

items.hook: A train derails on the Moscow Metro, killing at least 24 and injuring more than 160 others.
items.body: On 15 July 2014, at around 8:40 am MSK (UTC+03:00), an outbound Moscow Metro train derailed between Park Pobedy and Slavyansky Bulvar stations of the Arbatsko-Pokrovskaya Line. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: Kenji Kawai is a Japanese music composer and arranger.
items.body: Known as one of the biggest names in the soundtrack world, he has worked on a wide range of mixed media productions, including anime, TV shows, films, video games and ice shows. The world is stranger than it lets on.
